REDMIST-KALI.title: Kali
REDMIST-KALI.flavor: An imposing presence that awakens true potential in the most critical moments.
REDMIST-KALI.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards} and gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()}. Whenever your HP is below [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue], gain [gold]Partial E.G.O.[/gold]
